package rulecoverage

func PositiveMetricsLabelsBuiltInlineInHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "metrics_labels_built_inline_in_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that hand-build metric labels repeatedly instead of using focused observation helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
